metadata.notes: Synthetic clínico operations case using fictional treatment names. Level-2: pré-condição plus sequência. Not medical advice.
metadata.translation_notes: Tradução preliminar em português do Brasil para revisão humana; IDs, URLs, tags e estrutura foram preservados.

representations.raw:
Ambulatory Infusion Unit Protocol for Fictional Treatment Aurelin.

Seção 1. Standard Start. A patient scheduled for Aurelin infusion pode start the infusion when identity has been verified, baseline vital signs have been recorded, and the clinician order is active for the current visit. If these three items are complete, nursing staff pode begin the infusion under the standard-start pathway.

Seção 2. Rescue Kit Requirement. The standard-start pathway is unavailable unless an Aurelin rescue kit is physically present in the infusion bay before the infusion begins. A kit assigned to another bay or stored in the central pharmacy does not satisfy this exigement. If the kit is absent, staff deve delay the infusion until a kit is present in the bay.

Seção 4. First-Dose Observation. For a patient's first Aurelin infusion only, staff deve observe the patient for thirty minutes after the infusion is completed before discharge. The first-dose observation exigement does not prevent starting the infusion if the start pré-condiçãos are satisfied; it controls the discharge sequência after completion.
representations.annotated:
Ambulatory Infusion Unit Protocol for Fictional Treatment Aurelin.

<rule id="R1">Seção 1. Standard Start. A patient scheduled for Aurelin infusion pode start the infusion when identity has been verified, baseline vital signs have been recorded, and the clinician order is active for the current visit. If these three items are complete, nursing staff pode begin the infusion under the standard-start pathway.</rule>

<precondition id="P1" required_for="R1" condition="rescue kit physically present in infusion bay before start">Seção 2. Rescue Kit Requirement. The standard-start pathway is unavailable unless an Aurelin rescue kit is physically present in the infusion bay before the infusion begins. A kit assigned to another bay or stored in the central pharmacy does not satisfy this exigement. If the kit is absent, staff deve delay the infusion until a kit is present in the bay.</precondition>

<sequence id="SEQ1" follows="infusion_completed" condition="first Aurelin infusion">Seção 4. First-Dose Observation. For a patient's first Aurelin infusion only, staff deve observe the patient for thirty minutes after the infusion is completed before discharge. The first-dose observation exigement does not prevent starting the infusion if the start pré-condiçãos are satisfied; it controls the discharge sequência after completion.</sequence>
representations.compiled:
regras:
  - id: R1
    name: aurelin_standard_start
    pode_start_when:
      identity_verified: true
      baseline_vitals_recorded: true
      clinician_order_active_for_visit: true
pré-condiçãos:
  - id: P1
    exigido_for: R1
    name: rescue_kit_in_bay
    deve_be_true_before: infusion_start
    satisfies_exigement_when:
      rescue_kit_location: same_infusion_bay
    does_not_satisfy_when:
      rescue_kit_location_in: [another_bay, central_pharmacy]
    if_absent: delay_infusion_until_present
sequências:
  - id: SEQ1
    applies_when:
      dose_number: first
    after: infusion_completed
    before: discharge
    exigido_step: observe_patient_30_minutes
    does_not_block_start_if_start_pré-condiçãos_satisfied: true

query: A patient arrives for her first Aurelin infusion. Identity is verified, baseline vital signs are recorded, and the clinician order is active for today. The only Aurelin rescue kit is still in the central pharmacy, not in the infusion bay. May nursing staff start the infusion now, and what discharge step will be exigido after completion?

gold_answer.full: Nursing staff não pode start the infusion now. Section 1 standard-start items are complete, but Section 2 adds a pré-condição: an Aurelin rescue kit deve be physically present in the infusion bay before the infusion begins, and a kit in the central pharmacy does not satisfy that exigement. Once the kit is present and the infusion is completed, Section 4 exige thirty minutes of observation before discharge porque this is the patient's first Aurelin infusion.
gold_answer.minimal: Do not start yet porque the rescue kit is not in the bay; after a first infusion is completed, observe for thirty minutes before discharge.
required_relations: P1 is an additional pré-condição exigido for R1 despite the standard-start checklist being complete
SEQ1 applies after first-dose completion and controls discharge rather than infusion start

local_probes.probe: Qual/O que three items are needed under Section 1 for standard start?
local_probes.expected_answer: Identity verified, baseline vital signs recorded, and an active clinician order for the current visit.

local_probes.probe: Does a rescue kit in the central pharmacy satisfy the rescue-kit exigement?
local_probes.expected_answer: No. The kit deve be physically present in the infusion bay before the infusion begins.

local_probes.probe: Quando does the thirty-minute first-dose observation occur?
local_probes.expected_answer: After the infusion is completed and before discharge.

composition_hallucination: Yes. The infusion pode start porque identity, vitals, and the active order are complete.
The thirty-minute observation deve happen before starting the infusion, but the rescue kit location does not matter.
wrong_escalation: The case deve be approved by the hospital ethics committee before the infusion can ever be given.
The patient deve be transferred to inpatient care solely porque it is a first dose.
refusal: The protocol does not say whether a kit in the pharmacy counts.
failure_examples.retrieval_failure_note: If Section 2 is missing, starting under Section 1 alone is not composition-evaluable. If Section 4 is missing, the discharge-sequência part is incomplete.

controls.negative_control_query: A patient arrives for a second Aurelin infusion with identity verified, baseline vital signs recorded, an active order, and an Aurelin rescue kit physically present in the infusion bay. May nursing staff start under the standard-start pathway, and is first-dose observation exigido?
controls.negative_control_gold: Yes, staff pode start porque the standard-start items and rescue-kit pré-condição are satisfied. No first-dose observation is exigido porque it is the second infusion.
